title: Treasury Wine Shares Surge on Review of US Operations
title_cn: 美国业务审查导致国库酒股飙升
summary: Shares in Australian vintner Treasury Wine Estates Ltd. jumped by the most in six weeks after it unveiled plans to review its long-troubled US operations and said it would focus on securing its position in the luxury segment.

title: Braskem Seeking Restructuring With Lower Payments, Grace Periods
title_cn: Braskem 寻求以较低付款额和宽限期进行重组
summary: Braskem SA, the Brazilian petrochemical company, will present a debt restructuring plan to creditors that will include debt maturity extension, reduced coupon payments and more grace periods, according to a person familiar with the situation.

title: Iran Shock Jolts Asia and Europe to Speed Up Energy Transition
title_cn: 伊朗地震震动亚洲和欧洲，加速能源转型
summary: From the Yom Kippur war to Russia’s attack on Ukraine, history shows that major events in the oil and gas markets can drive enduring changes to the global energy mix, as governments and consumers look for new, more stable sources.

title: Blackstone-Backed Liftoff Raises $437 Million in Revived US IPO
title_cn: Blackstone 支持的 Liftoff 在恢复美国 IPO 中筹集 4.37 亿美元
summary: Liftoff Mobile Inc. raised $437 million in a US initial public offering that priced above its marketed range, in the company’s second attempt at going public this year.

title: Asia Centric: AI to Make Australia the Lucky Country Once Again
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：人工智能让澳大利亚再次成为幸运国家
summary: Australia is emerging as a surprising beneficiary of new technological shifts, even as the country faces a growth hit from the Middle East war. Rapidly accelerating data construction is driving an unprecedented demand for copper, while battery solutions are fueling a massive consumption of lithium. Escalating geopolitical tension is also providing a powerful tailwind for rare earths as Western nations hunt for secure ex-China supply – all of which is highly positive for the country’s mining sect

title: Asian Stocks Retreat From Record on Tech, Oil Dips: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 亚洲股市因科技股和油价下跌而从创纪录水平回落：市场总结
summary: Asian stocks fell alongside US equity-index futures as the AI-fueled rally that powered global equities to record highs lost momentum after a weak forecast from chipmaker Broadcom Inc.

title: Deadly Screwworm Parasite Found in US Threatens Cattle Herd
title_cn: 美国发现致命螺旋虫寄生虫威胁牛群
summary: A deadly cattle parasite was confirmed in the US for the first time in nearly a decade, posing the latest threat to a US herd already at its lowest level in 75 years.

title: Oil Falls as Israel and Lebanon Agree to Conditional Ceasefire
title_cn: 以色列和黎巴嫩同意有条件停火，油价下跌
summary: Oil slipped following three days of gains after Israel and Lebanon agreed to a ceasefire if Hezbollah also stops hostilities, which would remove a key sticking point in talks between Washington and Tehran.

title: South Korea Vows Action in Case of Excessive Move as Won Weakens
title_cn: 韩国誓言在韩元贬值时采取过度行动
summary: South Korea’s government pledged to curb excessive volatility as the currency approaches the lowest since 2009 and as bond yields climbed.

title: Gold Rises as Dip-Buyers Return After Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire
title_cn: 以色列-黎巴嫩停火后，黄金买家回归，金价上涨
summary: Gold pushed higher after Israel and Lebanon agreed to a conditional ceasefire, a possible step toward resolving the wider Middle East conflict that’s upended global energy markets and raised inflation risks.

title: Ebola Burial Team Attacked, 11 Patients Flee Care in Widening Outbreak in Congo
title_cn: 刚果埃博拉疫情蔓延，埋葬团队遭到袭击，11 名患者逃离护理
summary: A burial team was attacked and 11 Ebola patients fled isolation facilities in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, as the outbreak spread to another health zone in the country’s hardest-hit province.

title: Rupiah Near 18,000 Level Has Markets on Guard for Intervention
title_cn: 卢比接近 18,000 水平，市场警惕干预
summary: The Indonesian rupiah is closing in on a key psychological level, putting investors on watch for a stronger response from the central bank.

title: What to Know About the SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 关于 SpaceX 首次公开募股需要了解什么
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is poised to have the largest stock-market debut in history when it goes public later in June. SpaceX is aiming to raise $75 billion in the initial public offering, more than twice the previous record holder.

title: South Korea’s Left-Wing Wins Big in Local Vote in Boost for Lee
title_cn: 韩国左翼在当地投票中大获全胜，支持李明博
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung’s party won a resounding victory in key local elections, piling pressure on opposition conservatives as they struggle to reinvent their party after the debacle of their former leader’s martial law decree.

title: How Broadcom Stacks Up Against Its Peers
title_cn: 博通如何与同行竞争
summary: Gil Luria, DA Davidson Head of Technology Research, discusses the outlook for Broadcom as the Nvidia alternative releases its latest quarterly data. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: High Yields Lured UK Money From Cash Funds to Bonds Last Month
title_cn: 上个月高收益吸引英国资金从现金基金转向债券
summary: UK-based investors pulled money from cash funds and piled into bonds last month, enticed by surging yields, according to fund flow data compiled by Calastone.

title: CFTC Ends Decades-Old ‘Gag Rule’ in Enforcement Settlements
title_cn: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 在执行和解协议中结束了数十年之久的“禁言规则”
summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission is ending an almost 30-year-old policy that forbade companies and individuals from airing their grievances or denying wrongdoing after they settled enforcement cases with the derivatives regulator.

title: McKesson Unit Prices $2.25 Billion Leveraged Loan Ahead of IPO
title_cn: McKesson 在 IPO 前发行 22.5 亿美元杠杆贷款
summary: A $2.25 billion leveraged loan for McKesson Corp.’s medical-surgical unit priced on Wednesday, ahead of its planned initial public offering.

title: TickPick CEO on Soaring Prices for NBA Finals
title_cn: TickPick 首席执行官谈 NBA 总决赛价格飙升
summary: Brett Goldberg, Co-CEO and Co-Founder of TickPick, joined the program to discuss the current state of the ticket market as the NBA Finals between the Knicks and Spurs begin. He highlighted the contrasting behaviors in the secondary ticket market, noting that diehard fans are willing to pay premium prices to secure seats at major events, while some season ticket holders may choose to sell their tickets to make a profit. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Petco Slides as CEO Comments Show Turnaround Not Finished
title_cn: Petco 股价下滑，首席执行官评论显示扭亏为盈尚未完成
summary: Petco Health & Wellness Co. shares fell as much as 18% in postmarket trading after the company’s second-quarter forecast fell below consensus estimates, outweighing a better-than-expected first quarter including a return to positive revenue growth for the first time in nearly two years.

title: Nomura's Nanavati on Asia M&A Momentum, Strategy
title_cn: 野村证券的 Nanavati 谈亚洲并购势头和战略
summary: Nomura Head of Investment Banking for Asia ex-Japan Jwalant Nanavati shares his perspective on how landmark listings like SpaceX could shape the appetite for mergers and acquisitions across Asia and beyond. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Five Below Slides After Profit Beat as Retailer Flags Consumer Hit Over Oil High Prices
title_cn: 零售商表示消费者因油价高企而受到打击，利润超出预期后五点下滑
summary: Shares of Five Below Inc. tumbled on Wednesday after the discount retailer beat first-quarter earnings expectations and raised its full-year profit guidance but signaled caution over the consumer in the months ahead.

title: Energy Companies 'Weren't Prepared' For AI Data Center Boom Says NRG's Caroline Golin
title_cn: NRG 的 Caroline Golin 表示，能源公司“没有为人工智能数据中心的繁荣做好准备”
summary: Caroline Golin, chief growth and policy officer at NRG Energy, said that AI expansion has outpaced the infrastructure necessary to power it and that energy companies 'weren't prepared' for the opportunity in front of them as the US data center buildout ramps up even further. Despite the pressure on the grid, Golin says that the industry is working to make sure the infrastructure is in place to grow into the future.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Glazer Family Members Are Studying Manchester United Stake Sale
title_cn: 格雷泽家族成员正在研究曼联股权出售
summary: Some members of the billionaire Glazer family have been debating whether to sell their stake in Manchester United FC, after more than 20 years of ownership that has often been blighted by fan protest, people familiar with the matter said.

title: New Fed Beige Book Survey Shows Inflation Up Across Most Districts, Steady Employment
title_cn: 新的美联储褐皮书调查显示大多数地区通胀上升，就业稳定
summary: Stuart Paul, US and Canada economist for Bloomberg Economics, and Tom Keene, co-host of Bloomberg Surveillance, broke down the information out of the Fed's Beige Book Survey as the Fed reported inflation up across most districts, with costs rising due to conflict with Iran.  On the other side, employment remained steady.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: QXO Gets Better Terms on Buyout Debt After Strong Demand
title_cn: 需求强劲后，QXO 获得更好的收购债务条款
summary: QXO Building Products Inc. saw terms improve on a $6 billion financing package to fund its purchase of rival TopBuild Corp., which attracted more than three times the amount of demand from investors.

title: OpenAI y Anthropic alistan sus OPI que podrían redefinir el mercado de la inteligencia artificial
title_cn: OpenAI 和 Anthropic 准备首次公开募股，这可能会重新定义人工智能市场
summary: Dos grandes de la IA tienen la mirada puesta en los mercados bursátiles, pero algunos se preguntan si la salida a bolsa de SpaceX, prevista para junio, les va a robar el protagonismo.

title: Inotiv, Breeder of Laboratory Animals, Files For Bankruptcy
title_cn: 实验动物饲养商 Inotiv 申请破产
summary: Inotiv Inc., which breeds dogs and imports monkeys that are used in drug experiments, filed for bankruptcy in part on what it blamed are tighter rules on its US canine farm and tariffs on non-human primates raised in China.

title: Macy's CEO on Earnings, Brand Strategy and Outlook
title_cn: 梅西百货首席执行官谈盈利、品牌战略和展望
summary: Macy's CEO Tony Spring discusses the company's earnings, consumer spending trends and the outlook for retail sales with Romaine Bostick on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman’s Japan Chief Counts on New Leaders to Drive Growth
title_cn: 高盛日本业务主管依靠新领导人来推动增长
summary: Goldman Sachs Japan president Hidehiro Imatsu is promoting younger executives at the firm as a merger boom, rising stocks and volatile bond yields fuel the most intense talent war in years.

title: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Square to Exit Universal Music Stake
title_cn: 比尔·阿克曼的潘兴广场将退出环球音乐股份
summary: Bill Ackman is looking to sell his stake in Universal Music Group NV just days after the Amsterdam-listed company rejected a takeover bid by the hedge fund billionaire.

title: Why Amazon Has Struggled to Crack India
title_cn: 亚马逊为何难以攻克印度市场
summary: More than a decade after entering the country, the company is battling Walmart’s Flipkart and other incumbents.

title: Sam Altman Says He Doesn’t Plan to Put Money Into 2026 Elections
title_cn: 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 表示，他不打算为 2026 年选举投入资金
summary: OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman says he has no plans to make any financial contributions toward this year’s US elections, even as other Silicon Valley billionaires have already pledged to spend heavily to influence midterm races that will decide control of Congress.

title: DoubleLine’s Robert Cohen on AI Debt Loads, Private Credit
title_cn: DoubleLine 的 Robert Cohen 谈人工智能债务负担、私人信贷
summary: Robert Cohen, Director of Global Developed Credit at DoubleLine, discusses the current corporate fundraising environment. He notes that despite ongoing capital raising activities in both debt and equity markets, companies—particularly high-quality ones—continue to maintain strong balance sheets and generate healthy cash flow. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. SEC Chair: Giants Like SpaceX Need To Find Revenue Model
title_cn: 先生。 SEC 主席：SpaceX 等巨头需要寻找盈利模式
summary: Gary Gensler, former chair of both the CFTC and SEC, discusses the capital markets and the regulatory challenges they face. The discussion highlights the anticipated surge in IPO activity in 2026, with reported estimates of capital raised reaching up to $75 billion. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Broadcom Slides After AI Chip Outlook Disappoints Investors
title_cn: 人工智能芯片前景令投资者失望后博通股价下滑
summary: Broadcom Inc. shares fell in extended trading after the company delivered a disappointing forecast for artificial intelligence chip revenue, signaling its efforts to gain ground in the burgeoning industry are going more slowly than anticipated.

title: New McKinsey Report Probes US Manufacturing Vulnerabilities
title_cn: 麦肯锡新报告探讨美国制造业的脆弱性
summary: Eric Kutcher, McKinsey senior partner and North America chair, said that the technology sector is the where the US remains the most vulnerable to offshore supply chain disruptions as the world up its reliance on semiconductor chips, servers and PCs built in China. Kutcher said that while the US doesn't currently have the manufacturing ability for many of these items, new 'generations' of tech innovation provide opportunity to build out the infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rockefeller’s Sharma on AI Boom, US Market Fault Lines
title_cn: 洛克菲勒的夏尔马谈人工智能繁荣和美国市场断层线
summary: Ruchir Sharma, chairman of Rockefeller International and founder and chief investment officer of Breakout Capital, joins to provide insight into the current market dynamics. Sharma references his Financial Times op-ed, arguing that despite strong tech sector profits driven by AI advancements, the earnings narrative may be less robust than investors perceive, suggesting emerging vulnerabilities in the market. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Seeks to Raise $75 Billion in IPO Plan
title_cn: SpaceX寻求通过IPO计划筹集750亿美元
summary: SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an IPO that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, space and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Seeks $75B in Record IPO Plan to Fund AI, Launch
title_cn: SpaceX寻求75B美元创纪录的IPO计划以资助人工智能和发射
summary:
SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, space and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings.
The Starbase, Texas-based company plans to market about 555.6 million shares for $135, according to its filing Wednesday with the US Securities and Exchange Commission. At that price, SpaceX would have a market value of almost $1.77 trillion based on the outstanding shares in the filing. Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trade Groups Urge US to Boost Memory Chip Supply Strained by AI
title_cn: 贸易团体敦促美国增加因人工智能而紧张的存储芯片供应
summary: A global shortage of memory chips fueled by the artificial intelligence boom poses a growing risk to industries ranging from automakers to producers of medical devices, according to a coalition of US business groups who urged the Trump administration to help increase supply of the components.

title: CrowdStrike Shares Drop After Modest Sales Guidance Disappoints
title_cn: 温和的销售指引令人失望后，CrowdStrike 股价下跌
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc. shares fell after it projected second-quarter revenue that failed to impress investors who had bid up the stock in recent months amid concerns about the threat posed by hackers armed with powerful artificial intelligence tools.

title: AI CapEx Rush Seen as Continuing as Market Stresses Bubble Up
title_cn: 随着市场压力的加剧，人工智能资本支出热潮将持续
summary: The AI-driven boom will ease up at some point in the future but not yet, Diameter Capital Partners co-founder and Managing Partner Scott Goodwin said at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum on Wednesday.

title: AI Euphoria in Old World Auto Stocks Gets a Nod From Wall Street
title_cn: 旧世界汽车股中的人工智能欣欣向荣得到华尔街的认可
summary: Investors betting that more old-world auto companies are in line to benefit from the boom in artificial intelligence got another stamp of approval from Wall Street.

title: US Stops Sharing Crucial Election Threat Data With State Officials
title_cn: 美国停止与州官员分享重要的选举威胁数据
summary: Classified briefings and some cybersecurity services have ceased.

title: Nvidia’s RTX Spark Sets Up Fight Over the Soul of Windows PCs
title_cn: Nvidia 的 RTX Spark 为 Windows PC 的灵魂而战
summary: The future of the personal computer is a hot topic again, courtesy of Nvidia Corp.’s announcement this week with Microsoft Corp. The leader in AI hardware is taking another run at making the central component for laptops, promising to bring the biggest change to the devices in decades.

title: AI Data Center Parts Maker Xnrgy Said to Mull $10 Billion Sale
title_cn: AI 数据中心零部件制造商 Xnrgy 据称考虑出售 100 亿美元
summary: The owners of Xnrgy Climate Systems, a closely held manufacturer of heating an cooling parts for AI data centers, are considering a sale that could value the company at as much as $10 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: BofA CEO Moynihan on Affordability, Lending and AI Spending
title_cn: 美国银行首席执行官莫伊尼汉谈负担能力、贷款和人工智能支出
summary: Bank of America CEO Brian Moynihan discusses consumer spending trends amid rising inflation, affordability issues and the impact of AI on the banking industry. He speaks with Bloomberg's Dani Burger at the Forbes Iconoclast Summit in New York. (Corrects location of interview.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Funding Boom Reaches Muni Market With Google-Tied Deal
title_cn: 人工智能融资热潮通过与谷歌合作的交易进入市政市场
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc. is poised to enter the municipal-bond market’s prepaid energy space by participating in a $1 billion transaction out of California, a major development in the evolution of a booming segment.

title: DoubleLine's Cohen Warns of AI Bubble Coming to Credit Markets
title_cn: DoubleLine 的科恩警告人工智能泡沫将进入信贷市场
summary: Robert Cohen, director of global developed credit at DoubleLine, says artificial intelligence debt will almost certainly reach bubble levels during a panel at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alphabet Upsizes Offering for AI Spending to $85 Billion
title_cn: Alphabet 将 AI 支出扩大至 850 亿美元
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc. upsized its equity raise to $84.75 billion from the $80 billion it announced just two days earlier in a bid to help fund growing artificial intelligence spending plans.

title: Alphabet Upsizes Equity Offering to $85B for AI Spending
title_cn: Alphabet 将股票发行规模扩大至 85B 美元用于人工智能支出
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Matthew Palazola joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." Google parent Alphabet upsized its equity raise to $84.75 billion from the $80 billion it announced just two days earlier in a bid to help fund growing artificial intelligence spending plans. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bank of America Bucks AI Job Fears With 2,000 Summer Interns
title_cn: 美国银行通过 2,000 名暑期实习生克服人工智能工作恐惧
summary: Bank of America Corp. is continuing to hire even as artificial intelligence and other technology tools take over jobs and cut off many traditional career paths.

title: How Duke Energy Plans to Meet AI Demand
title_cn: 杜克能源计划如何满足人工智能需求
summary: Duke Energy President Harry Sideris says the utility is focused on keeping power affordable for customers while meeting surging demand from AI and data centers. Sideris spoke with Bloomberg’s Tyler Kendall at the Edison Electric Institute Conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Financing Is an Arms Race, Says GoldenTree's Tananbaum
title_cn: 金树科技的塔南鲍姆表示，人工智能融资是一场军备竞赛
summary: GoldenTree Asset Management Founder and CIO Steven Tananbaum says he expects credit to continue to languish, though there are some pockets of opportunity, and adds that the financing of AI is an arms race. He sat down with Lisa Abramowicz at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York City. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DoubleLine’s Cohen Says AI Bubble Is Coming to Credit Markets
title_cn: DoubleLine 的科恩表示人工智能泡沫即将进入信贷市场
summary: Artificial intelligence debt will almost certainly reach bubble levels eventually, given the history of periods of heavy investments in areas like railroads and the internet, said DoubleLine portfolio manager Robert Cohen.

title: SpaceX Rejects Another Wall Street Convention Ahead of IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 拒绝在 IPO 前举行另一场华尔街会议
summary: SpaceX plans to offer shares at $135 apiece to raise $75 billion in its IPO, rejecting yet another Wall Street convention by setting a fixed price ahead of the marketing phase of the deal. Bloomberg's Katherine Doherty joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX To Target $75B in IPO at $135 Per Share | Bloomberg Tech 6/03/2026
title_cn: SpaceX IPO 目标价为 75B 美元，每股 135 美元彭博科技 6/03/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss SpaceX's plan to offer shares at $135 apiece to raise $75 billion in its IPO, rejecting yet another Wall Street convention by setting a fixed price ahead of the marketing phase of the deal. Plus, Palo Alto Networks falls after the company reported its results, failing to meet elevated buyside expectations. And, candidates backed by tech billionaires and founders fall short in California's primary elections. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US: Israel, Lebanon to Have Ceasefire If Hezbollah Stops
title_cn: 美国：如果真主党停止以色列和黎巴嫩将停火
summary: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to implement a ceasefire if Hezbollah also agrees to stop hostilities, according to a joint statement from both countries and the US. Bloomberg's Romy Varghese reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: House Passes Iran War Powers Measure, Rebuking Trump | Balance of Power: Late Edition 6/3/2026
title_cn: 众议院通过伊朗战争权力措施，斥责特朗普权力平衡：最新版 2026 年 6 月 3 日
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Republican Representative Michael McCaul of Texas, spoke about Congress' War Powers vote and warns that it could 'undermine' and 'take away leverage' from President Donald Trump during ongoing negotiations with Iran, Ned Lamont, Democratic Governor of Connecticut, talks about his state's proposed legislation to enforce a 100% tax on payments received from Donald Trump's $1.8B 'weaponization fund,' and Jeanne Shaheen, Democratic Senator of New Hampshire, speaks about Congress' War Powers vote. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Shaheen: President Needs to Rethink Policy on Iran
title_cn: 参议员沙欣：总统需要重新考虑对伊朗的政策
summary: Democratic Senator Jeanne Shaheen of New Hampshire, a member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, speaks about Congress' War Powers vote as well as the State Department not providing any information on foreign policy matters, saying it is 'not acceptable.' She also discusses her proposed legislation to cap the price of insulin for Americans suffering from diabetes. Senator Shaheen speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Order Directs Customs to Crack Down on Tariff Cheats
title_cn: 特朗普命令指示海关打击关税欺诈行为
summary: President Donald Trump signed an executive order designed to tighten customs enforcement, his latest move to ramp up protectionist trade policies.

title: Trump Plans $700 Million to Build Coal Plants, Export Site
title_cn: 特朗普计划斥资 7 亿美元建设燃煤电厂和出口基地
summary: President Donald Trump is preparing to use Cold War-era authorities to dole hundreds of millions of federal dollars to support coal-fired electricity as well as US exports of the fossil fuel.

title: Gov. Lamont: Weaponization Fund is Not a Dead Issue
title_cn: 拉蒙特州长：武器化基金不是一个死问题
summary: Ned Lamont, Democratic Governor of Connecticut, talks about his state's proposed legislation to enforce a 100% tax on payments received from Donald Trump's $1.8B 'weaponization fund.' He also discusses data centers, saying they would have to find ways to produce their own energy to prevent 'demand issues' for the state. Governor Lamont speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Says Israel, Lebanon Agree to Ceasefire If Hezbollah Stops
title_cn: 美国表示，如果真主党停止行动，以色列和黎巴嫩同意停火
summary: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to implement a ceasefire if Hezbollah also agrees to stop hostilities, according to a joint statement from both countries and the US.

title: Rep. McCaul: War Powers Vote from House is Ill-Timed
title_cn: 众议员麦考尔：众议院的战争权力投票不合时宜
summary: Republican Representative Michael McCaul of Texas, a member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee, spoke about Congress' War Powers vote and warns that it could 'undermine' and 'take away leverage' from President Donald Trump during ongoing negotiations with Iran. He speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Decline as US-Iran Clashes Drive Oil Higher | The Close 6/3/2026
title_cn: 美伊冲突推高油价，股市下跌收盘价 2026 年 6 月 3 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Former SEC Chair Gary Gensler, Raymond James Global Head of Private Capital Advisory Sunaina Sinha Haldea, Rockefeller International Chairman Ruchir Sharma, LSEG Director of Consumer Research Jharrone Martis, Citigroup US Equity Strategist Scott Chronert, Exelon CEO Calvin Butler, DA Davidson Head of Technology Research Gil Luria, DoubleLine Director of Global Developed Credit Robert Cohen, Macy’s CEO Tony Spring, & TickPick Co-CEO & Co-Founder Brett Goldberg. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Tested by Japan, Philippines on Taiwan as Trump Treads Softly
title_cn: 特朗普态度温和，习近平在台湾问题上受到日本和菲律宾考验
summary: As the Trump administration tones down its public stance on Taiwan, key US allies Japan and the Philippines are becoming more vocal in challenging Chinese President Xi Jinping on his most sensitive issue.

title: Fed’s Beige Book Shows Steady Employment, Higher Inflation| Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/3/2026
title_cn: 美联储褐皮书显示就业稳定、通胀上升|彭博商业周刊日报 6/3/2026
summary: Today, Stuart Paul, US and Canada economist for Bloomberg Economics, and Tom Keene, co-host of Bloomberg Surveillance, break down the information out of the Fed's Beige Book Survey as most Fed regions saw higher inflation than the previous period. Will Kubzansky, Bloomberg News refined products reporters, discusses oil prices moving higher as the US and Iran seem to remain far apart on a potential peace deal. Also, Bank of America CEO and Chairman Brian Moynihan talks with Bloomberg's Dani Burger and Bloomberg Washington correspondent Tyler Kendall sits down with Xcel Energy CEO Bob Frenzel. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: War Powers Vote Should Send Trump a Message, Senator Shaheen Says
title_cn: 参议员沙欣表示，战争权力投票应该向特朗普传达一个信息
summary: US Senator Jeanne Shaheen, a New Hampshire Democrat and ranking member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, reacts to the House of Representatives voting 215-208 to halt the US war with Iran, breaking with President Donald Trump on an unpopular foreign conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Downplays Threats of Hormuz Mines, Touts Alternate Route
title_cn: 特朗普淡化霍尔木兹地雷的威胁，兜售替代路线
summary: President Donald Trump downplayed the threat posed by Iranian sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping, even as other US officials have warned of their dangers.

title: Republican-Led House Votes to Stop Iran War, Rebuking Trump
title_cn: 共和党领导的众议院投票停止伊朗战争，谴责特朗普
summary: The move won’t end US military attacks and still faces a Senate vote.

title: Trump Says Hormuz Will Open as Soon as Peace Deal Signed
title_cn: 特朗普称和平协议签署后霍尔木兹海峡将开放
summary: President Donald Trump says in theory Iran is getting pretty close to signing on paper and the Hormuz Strait will open immediately upon signing during remarks with reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. Morocco Ambassador: ‘Time Is on Its Side’ With Iran
title_cn: 先生。摩洛哥大使：对伊朗“时间站在一边”
summary: Former US Ambassador to Morocco and Senior Iran Adviser to President Obama, Puneet Talwar, discussed the complexities surrounding ongoing US-Iran negotiations for an interim deal. Despite reports of suspended talks due to fighting in Lebanon, President Trump remains optimistic about continuous conversations with Iran. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Intelligence Is Doomed Under Pulte
title_cn: 美国情报部门在普尔特的领导下注定失败
summary: Trump’s pick for the next director of national intelligence is unqualified and a lackey to the president. That will bring US intelligence from bad to worse, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Andreas Kluth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Pick of Pulte as Acting Spy Chief Shows Loyalty Is Top Factor
title_cn: 特朗普选择普尔特担任代理间谍头子表明忠诚是首要因素
summary: The president wants revenge on his perceived enemies, and the housing agency head delivers.

title: Senate GOP Cuts Trump Ballroom Funds | Balance of Power: Early Edition 6/3/2026
title_cn: 参议院共和党削减特朗普宴会厅资金|权力平衡：早期版本 6/3/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Georgia Governor Brian Kemp and Massachusetts Congressman Jake Auchincloss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Order Makes It Easier to Fire Agency Staffers At Will
title_cn: 特朗普命令让随意解雇机构工作人员变得更容易
summary: President Donald Trump signed an executive order Wednesday stripping job security from nearly 8,000 federal positions, expanding his authority to fire career employees who work on policy matters and accelerating a civil-service overhaul that’s drawn legal and political pushback.

title: Edison CEO Calls Steyer's Anti-Utility Comments 'Unfortunate'
title_cn: 爱迪生首席执行官称斯泰尔的反公用事业言论“不幸”
summary: Edison International CEO Pedro Pizarro spoke with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the Edison Electric Institute 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. He pushed back against California governor candidate Tom Steyer’s call to lower rates. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: S&P 500 Rally Runs Into Wall Following Deadly US-Iran Flare-up
title_cn: 美伊冲突爆发后，标普 500 指数涨势陷入困境
summary: The rally in US stocks stalled on Wednesday as clashes between the US and Iran put further strain on a fragile ceasefire agreement, while also driving oil higher.

title: GOP Ends Blockade After Trump Concedes on Ballroom, Payout Fund
title_cn: 特朗普在舞厅和支付基金问题上让步后，共和党结束封锁
summary: Senate Republicans leveraged a spending package to wrest concessions from President Donald Trump on his new White House ballroom and a controversial fund he set up to pay political allies who claim to have been unfairly targeted by the federal government.

title: LinkedIn China Spying Threat Prompts Warning From US, Allies
title_cn: LinkedIn 中国间谍威胁引发美国及其盟友的警告
summary: The US and its “Five Eyes” intelligence partners issued what they said was an unprecedented joint notice warning about attempts by Chinese spies to use websites such as LinkedIn to recruit assets.

title: Trump Says He’ll Attend G-7 Summit in France This Month
title_cn: 特朗普表示他将于本月出席在法国举行的七国集团峰会
summary: President Donald Trump announced he would attend the Group of Seven leaders summit in France, a gathering set to take place amid tensions between the president and US allies over the war in Iran.

title: US Trade Judge Warns DOJ Appeal Could Upend Trump Tariff Refunds
title_cn: 美国贸易法官警告司法部上诉可能会颠覆特朗普关税退款
summary: A US trade judge took the unusual step of personally responding to the Trump administration’s appeal of his order to refund $166 billion in tariffs the Supreme Court declared unlawful, calling the government’s filings “colorful” and questioning its legal stance.

title: Georgia’s Kemp Rips Democrat’s ‘Insane’ Bid to Halt Data Centers
title_cn: 佐治亚州的坎普驳斥了民主党停止数据中心的“疯狂”提议
summary: Georgia Governor Brian Kemp, a defender of data centers in one of the states where they’re growing fastest, faulted Democratic nominee Keisha Lance Bottoms as “irresponsible” for proposing a pause in building new facilities.

title: US, Iran Exchange Military Strikes to Put Fresh Strains on Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国和伊朗相互军事打击，给停火带来新的压力
summary: The US and Iran clashed again overnight, with Kuwait and Bahrain caught in the crossfire of the most serious flare-up since a ceasefire went into effect in early April.
